assertions.assertion: States that no separate NuGet package is needed — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
States that Enterprise Edition license is required
assertions.rationale: Says 'Business or Enterprise editions' — hedges instead of stating Enterprise is required.

assertions.assertion: Mentions SAML support was introduced in version 8.0
assertions.rationale: Does not mention version 8.0 at all.
